name: @matsumiko/runbook
description: Operational instruction kit for AI coding agents.

scripts.test: node bin/runbook.js --help && node bin/runbook.js list && node bin/runbook.js init ./tmp-runbook-smoke --agent all --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill list && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-foundation-builder ./tmp-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-figma-to-theme ./tmp-figma-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-component-builder ./tmp-component-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-detail-page-builder ./tmp-detail-page-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-page-builder ./tmp-page-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-dashboard-builder ./tmp-dashboard-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-auth-builder ./tmp-auth-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-onboarding-builder ./tmp-onboarding-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-search-builder ./tmp-search-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-empty-state-builder ./tmp-empty-state-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-marketing-builder ./tmp-marketing-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-checkout-builder ./tmp-checkout-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-settings-builder ./tmp-settings-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-polish-pass ./tmp-polish-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-form-builder ./tmp-form-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-table-builder ./tmp-table-skill-smoke --dry-run

author: Matsumiko
